creator: enrico@vicampus.com
text:
Hi,

I just tried FreeBSD 7 Beta 4 with a Microsoft Habu Mouse (USB).
Unfortunately this mouse is detected as keyboard "ukbd", with and without
the patch from the PR.

The complete message is:
"uhid0: <Tempest Habu Mouse, class 0/0, rev 1=2E10/21=2E00, addr 2> on uhub1
ukbd0 <Tempest Habu Mouse, class 0/0, rev 1=2E10/21=2E00, addr 2> on uhub1 
kbd2 at ukbd0"

When the patch is applied, the mouse will blink several times when booting.
Without the patch the mouse is powered on once at the beginning of the boot
process and will then be shutdown very fast.

I dont know what to do now, the mouse does not work with X?  If you want me
to test something or send you more messages, feel free to contact me :-)

Best regards,
Enrico
